data.body:
IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN:complete

Approach: Proposal B (file-by-file, 5 tasks) selected via dso:approach-decision-maker. All tasks are doc-only (testing_mode: GREEN per behavioral-testing-standard Rule 5).

Tasks created:
- f4e1-cc19: Update CLAUDE.md Architecture section (External Dependencies feature summary + manual:awaiting_user entry)
- 2708-ac99: Update CONFIGURATION-REFERENCE.md (planning.external_dependency_block_enabled + planning.verification_command_timeout_seconds)
- a8cd-21a1: Update brainstorm/SKILL.md Quick Reference (flag-gated behavior row)
- 9333-8e90: Update preplanning/SKILL.md + implementation-plan/SKILL.md Quick Reference tables (manual:awaiting_user behavior)
- 6ba6-8498: Update sprint/SKILL.md Phase 2 batch-filter section (manual:awaiting_user filter note)

Key constraint: plugins/dso/docs/contracts/external-dependencies-block.md does not yet exist (Story A bec5-7f84 open). All tasks reference the intended path — implementation agents should verify the file exists before adding references or note it as forthcoming.

Approach decision rationale: file-by-file decomposition maximizes per-task atomicity, handles sprint SKILL.md structural difference (no Quick Reference table; uses Phase section body instead), and follows established doc-story conventions.
